sectiondef.header: Error codes for the ITC XOP2
Wrapper functions redirecting to the correct internal implementations depending on #HARDWARE_DAC_TYPES

memberdef.argsstring: (variable hardwareType, variable deviceID, variable mode, WaveOrNull data=defaultValue, HW_WAVE_GETTER_PROTOTYPE dataFunc=defaultValue, WaveOrNull config=defaultValue, HW_WAVE_GETTER_PROTOTYPE configFunc=defaultValue, variable flags=defaultValue, variable offset=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: HW_PrepareAcq

briefdescription.para: Prepare for data acquisition.

parameterdescription.para: [optional, defaults to GetDAQDataWave()] override wave getter for the ITC data wave
[optional, defaults to GetDAQConfigWave()] override wave getter for the ITC config wave
[optional, default none] One or multiple flags from HardwareInteractionFlags
[optional, defaults to zero] offset into the data wave in points

briefdescription.para: Select a device.

detaileddescription.para: Only used in special cases for ITC hardware as all ITC operations use the /DEV flag nowadays.

parameterdescription.para: [optional, default none] One or multiple flags from HardwareInteractionFlags

briefdescription.para: Open a device.

parameterdescription.para: [optional, default none] One or multiple flags from HardwareInteractionFlags

briefdescription.para: Close a device.

parameterdescription.para: [optional, default none] One or multiple flags from HardwareInteractionFlags

memberdef.argsstring: (variable hardwareType, variable deviceID, variable channel, variable value, variable flags=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: HW_WriteDAC

briefdescription.para: Write a value to a DA/AO channel.

parameterdescription.para: [optional, default none] One or multiple flags from HardwareInteractionFlags

memberdef.argsstring: (variable hardwareType, variable deviceID, variable channel, variable flags=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: HW_ReadADC

briefdescription.para: Read a value from an AD/AI channel.

parameterdescription.para: [optional, default none] One or multiple flags from HardwareInteractionFlags

memberdef.argsstring: (variable hardwareType, variable deviceID, variable channel, variable line=defaultValue, variable flags=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: HW_ReadDigital

briefdescription.para: Read from a digital channel.

parameterdescription.para: The hardware documentation terms this as port(NI). For the ITC we call that ttlBit. Takes care of special rack handling for the ITC 1600. Range depends on hardware and hardware type.
bit of TTL line, (only for hardware types which support single TTL writes/read)
[optional, default none] One or multiple flags from HardwareInteractionFlags

simplesect.para: bitmask denoting the state of the channel/line

memberdef.argsstring: (variable hardwareType, variable deviceID, variable channel, variable value, variable line=defaultValue, variable flags=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: HW_WriteDigital

briefdescription.para: Write to a digital channel.

parameterdescription.para: The hardware documentation terms this as port(NI). For the ITC we call that ttlBit. Takes care of special rack handling for the ITC 1600. Range depends on hardware and hardware type.
bit of TTL line, (only for hardware types which support single TTL writes/read)
[optional, default none] One or multiple flags from HardwareInteractionFlags

briefdescription.para: Enable yoking.

parameterdescription.para: [optional, default none] One or multiple flags from HardwareInteractionFlags

briefdescription.para: Enable yoking.

parameterdescription.para: [optional, default none] One or multiple flags from HardwareInteractionFlags

memberdef.argsstring: (variable hardwareType, variable deviceID, variable prepareForDAQ=defaultValue, variable zeroDAC=defaultValue, variable flags=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: HW_StopAcq

briefdescription.para: Stop data acquisition.

parameterdescription.para: immediately prepare for the next data acquisition after stopping it
set all used DA channels to zero
[optional, default none] One or multiple flags from HardwareInteractionFlags

briefdescription.para: Determine if data acquisition is currently active.

parameterdescription.para: [optional, default none] One or multiple flags from HardwareInteractionFlags

briefdescription.para: Return hardware specific information from the device.

parameterdescription.para: [optional, default none] One or multiple flags from HardwareInteractionFlags

simplesect.para: free numeric/text wave with information and dimension labels

briefdescription.para: Return hardware specific information from the device.

detaileddescription.para: This function does not require the device to be registered compared to HW_GetDeviceInfo().

parameterdescription.para: [optional, default none] One or multiple flags from HardwareInteractionFlags

briefdescription.para: Update the device info wave.

memberdef.argsstring: (variable hardwareType, variable deviceID, variable triggerMode=defaultValue, variable flags=defaultValue, variable repeat=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: HW_StartAcq

briefdescription.para: Start data acquisition.

parameterdescription.para: [optional, defaults to HARDWARE_DAC_DEFAULT_TRIGGER] one of TriggerModeStartAcq
[optional, default none] One or multiple flags from HardwareInteractionFlags
[optional, default 0] for NI devices, repeats the scan after it ends

briefdescription.para: Reset the device.

parameterdescription.para: [optional, default none] One or multiple flags from HardwareInteractionFlags

briefdescription.para: Assert on using an invalid value of hardwareType or deviceID
Check if the given hardware type is valid.

detaileddescription.para: Invalid here means that the value is out-of-range.

briefdescription.para: Check if the given device ID is valid.

detaileddescription.para: Invalid here means that the value is out-of-range.

memberdef.argsstring: (string mainDevice, variable hardwareType, variable deviceID, string pressureDevice=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: HW_RegisterDevice

briefdescription.para: Register an opened device in our device map.

parameterdescription.para: required for registering pressure control devices

briefdescription.para: Deregister an opened device in our device map.

parameterdescription.para: [optional, default none] One or multiple flags from HardwareInteractionFlags

briefdescription.para: Return the name of the main device given the deviceID and the hardwareType

detaileddescription.para: Use this function if you want to derive a storage location from the device name.

briefdescription.para: Return the name of the device given the deviceID and the hardwareType

detaileddescription.para: Prefers the pressure device name if set.

briefdescription.para: Build the device string for ITC devices.

detaileddescription.para: There is no corresponding function for other hardware types like NI devices because those do not have a two part device name

memberdef.argsstring: (variable deviceID, WaveOrNull config=defaultValue, HW_WAVE_GETTER_PROTOTYPE configFunc=defaultValue, variable prepareForDAQ=defaultValue, variable zeroDAC=defaultValue, variable flags=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: HW_ITC_StopAcq

memberdef.argsstring: (variable deviceID, WaveOrNull config=defaultValue, HW_WAVE_GETTER_PROTOTYPE configFunc=defaultValue, variable flags=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: HW_ITC_ResetFifo

memberdef.argsstring: (variable deviceID, variable channel, variable value, variable flags=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: HW_ITC_WriteDAC

memberdef.argsstring: (variable deviceID, variable xopChannel, variable value, variable flags=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: HW_ITC_WriteDigital

memberdef.argsstring: (variable deviceID, variable mode, WaveOrNull data=defaultValue, HW_WAVE_GETTER_PROTOTYPE dataFunc=defaultValue, WaveOrNull config=defaultValue, HW_WAVE_GETTER_PROTOTYPE configFunc=defaultValue, variable flags=defaultValue, variable offset=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: HW_ITC_PrepareAcq

memberdef.argsstring: (variable deviceID, variable ADChannelToMonitor, variable stopCollectionPoint, wave config, variable *fifoPos=defaultValue, variable flags=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: HW_ITC_MoreData_TS

memberdef.argsstring: (variable deviceID, variable ADChannelToMonitor=defaultValue, variable stopCollectionPoint=defaultValue, WaveOrNull config=defaultValue, HW_WAVE_GETTER_PROTOTYPE configFunc=defaultValue, variable *fifoPos=defaultValue, variable flags=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: HW_ITC_MoreData

briefdescription.para: Construct the /Z flag value for the ITC operations.

detaileddescription.para: Takes interactiveMode into account for automated testing.

sectiondef.header: Utility functions not interacting with hardware

briefdescription.para: Returns the device channel offset for the given device.

simplesect.para: 16 for ITC1600 and 0 for all other types

briefdescription.para: Return the first and last TTL bits/channels for the given rack
Clip the ttlBit to adapt for differences in notation.

detaileddescription.para: The DA_Ephys panel e.g. labels the first ttlBit of RACK_ONE as 4, but the ITC XOP treats that as 0.

briefdescription.para: Return the rack number for the given ttlBit (the ttlBit is called TTL channel in the DA Ephys panel)
Return the ITC XOP channel for the given rack.

detaileddescription.para: Only the ITC1600 has two racks. The channel numbers differ for the different ITC device types.

briefdescription.para: Get the number of racks for the given device.

detaileddescription.para:
ITC:
ITC1600 can have 1 or 2 racks
other device types have 1

briefdescription.para: Assert on using an invalid NI device name.
Check wether the given NI device name is valid.

detaileddescription.para: Currently a device name is valid if it is not empty.

briefdescription.para: Return the analog input configuration bits as string.

memberdef.argsstring: (variable deviceID, variable triggerMode, variable flags=defaultValue, variable repeat=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: HW_NI_StartAcq

memberdef.argsstring: (variable deviceID, variable mode, WaveOrNull data=defaultValue, HW_WAVE_GETTER_PROTOTYPE dataFunc=defaultValue, WaveOrNull config=defaultValue, HW_WAVE_GETTER_PROTOTYPE configFunc=defaultValue, variable flags=defaultValue, variable offset=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: HW_NI_PrepareAcq

memberdef.argsstring: (string device, variable DIOPort=defaultValue, variable DIOLine=defaultValue, variable flags=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: HW_NI_ReadDigital

memberdef.argsstring: (string device, variable value, variable DIOPort=defaultValue, variable DIOLine=defaultValue, variable flags=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: HW_NI_WriteDigital

memberdef.argsstring: (string device, variable channel, variable value, variable flags=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: HW_NI_WriteAnalogSingleAndSlow

briefdescription.para: HW Low level hardware configuration and querying functions

detaileddescription.para: Naming scheme of the functions is HW_$TYPE_$Suffix where $TYPE is one of ITC or NI.
